title: Duplicate a formula column but with values not the formula
excerpt:
Hello. 
Looking for a way to be able to change or duplicate a column that has a formula in BUT when duplicated or changed it has the actual values of the formula. 
Many thanks 
Lisa

posts.author: MaxLogic_Lisa (Lisa Armstrong)

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@DanIngham-IOI, @MaxLogic_Lisa

In spite of the text in the graphic, General Caster uses their own formulas. It used to use monday native formulas. Not anymore.

Jim - The Monday Man
